options.name: -f
options.description: Ignore nonexistent files and never prompt

options.name: -r
options.description: Remove directories and their contents recursively

options.name: -R
options.description: Remove directories and their contents recursively (alias of -r)

options.name: -d
options.description: Remove empty directories as well as files

options.name: -v
options.description: Show files as they are removed

options.name: -P
options.description: Overwrite regular files before deleting them
